channel_intelligence.state_of_channel: Day 14. 6 videos live, 70 lifetime views, 4 subscribers (+3 this week). Weekly views dipped 37→32 (-14%) but that's noise at this scale. The real story: growth is coming almost entirely from long-form. The first long (Study Music) gained +20 views in its SECOND week — that's YouTube search picking it up, the evergreen compounding this channel is built for. Deep metrics (CTR, watch time, traffic sources) unlock once the ADM account is added to Chrome.
what_works: LONG-FORM >> SHORTS: longs average ~30 lifetime views/video vs 2.5 for shorts — a 10x+ gap. Longs are the growth engine; shorts are currently decoration.
SEARCH-INTENT TITLES: 'Study Music … for Focus' long has 56 views vs 3 for the 'Rainy' long. People search 'bossa nova study music' — mood-only titles don't get found.
COMPOUNDING: the Jun 22 long is still accelerating in week 2 (+20). Long playlist videos age like assets, not posts.
Subscribers arrived (+3) the same week the study long compounded — search viewers convert.
next_moves: Protect the Monday long. If anything gets extra effort (thumbnail, title, mix), it's that.
Title every long with a search phrase: study, focus, work, relax, sleep, morning coffee.
Fun Bossa starts Jul 13 — first clean style A/B test. Compare its week-1 long views vs Soft Bossa longs (20 and 3).
Consider swapping one weekly short for a second long once rendering capacity allows.
Add the ADM Google account to Chrome to unlock CTR, impressions, watch time and traffic sources in this report.
suno_prompts: Slow bossa nova instrumental, warm nylon-string guitar, soft brushed drums, mellow Rhodes piano, no vocals, relaxed steady tempo, cozy cafe ambience for studying and deep work
Gentle Brazilian jazz trio — acoustic guitar, upright bass, light shaker — calm and unintrusive, consistent energy, no vocals, background music for focus and reading
Upbeat bossa nova, bright acoustic guitar, playful flute melody, cheerful morning-coffee energy, medium tempo, instrumental, clean warm mix
channel_intelligence.suno_rules: Data-backed prompt rules so far: (1) always 'instrumental / no vocals' — this is background music; (2) keep energy CONSISTENT, no big dynamic swings — study listeners leave when a track spikes; (3) put the LISTENING CONTEXT in the prompt (studying, deep work, morning coffee) — it shapes arrangement toward what the search audience expects; (4) name 2-3 concrete instruments, not just a genre.

social_intelligence.state_of_socials: 6 reels published via Zernio (Jul 7-8, one per platform per day at 6pm ET). Followers: YouTube 4, Instagram 3, TikTok 3 — seed audience, too early for patterns. Posting paused Jul 9-11 (scheduler issue on the Mac, fix in progress) despite 12 clips ready in the queue. New cadence from Jul 12: 2 clips/day (12pm + 6pm ET), 7 days/week; week the nightly reel factory adds up to 20 clips/night (~110 capacity).
whats_out: 6 reels live: 2 on Instagram, 2 on TikTok, 2 on YouTube Shorts (Jul 7 + Jul 8, 6pm ET slots)
All reels point to the YouTube channel (link-in-bio funnel)
Posting cadence configured Mon-Thu 6pm ET via Zernio; TikTok account is the paid Zernio slot ($6/mo)
suggestions: Verify the Mac posting scheduler is loaded (launchctl) — clips were ready Jul 9-11 but nothing fired. Highest-impact fix.
When Shorts cuts land, extend posting to 7 days/week — 60+ clips supports months of daily posting on all 3 platforms.
Carry the mood+action title rule into captions: 'study', 'focus', 'morning coffee' — same search intent works in social discovery.
Watch TikTok vs IG vs Shorts view counts once ~10 posts each are live; double down where retention is best (weekly report will score this).
